contact_points.usage: Grasp the key by the head (bow) or handle area. This is the main contact point for grasping the key.

functional_points.description: Key tip (bit) and its insertion / rotation axis
functional_points.usage: Functional point for engaging the keyhole using the key tip. Use this point to insert the key into the keyhole(local -Z dir), then apply a rotation about the key's axis to unlock(+wz)/lock(-wz).
